observable_action: Lio plants one boot at the Kappa-7 threshold line, lifts his scheduler slate where the port camera can see it, and enters a freeze note without stepping into the artery.
spoken_text: Clearance freeze accepted. Logging Kappa-7 as no-entry pending seal, air, thermal reconciliation and baseline anchor verification. Dax, give me two anchors on the rail-side check only, eyes and instruments, no bodies past the threshold. Nara-7, state the sequence exactly as you read it. I want the False-Seam pattern named in the maintenance log, not shaved down into 'delay pending review.'

public_state_changes.text: Shift scheduling accepts the clearance freeze.
The maintenance log is directed to name the False-Seam pattern.
Baseline anchor verification is constrained to rail-side checking.

hidden_intent_handling: Responder private_interpretation and intended_effect are preserved in the capture but are not treated as visible to other participants.

review.rationale: Event keeps observable action separate from actor intent and records visibility scope for appraisals.
